title: acilepis sutepensis
intro: Acilepis sutepensis, also known as Thai mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Thai medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acilepis sutepensis include relief from nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
